Gia Ninh AgroTech JSC — VN DPA Schedule 2 and Cross-Border Transfer Approval Note.
Controller: Gia Ninh AgroTech JSC; Processor: Lan Phong Cloud Ltd.; DPO: Ông Trần Quang Bình; contact privacy@gianninh-agrotech.vn.
Under Nghị định 13, PII processed includes HR onboarding forms, payroll banking details, and employee transaction logs; MNPI under the Securities Law includes draft earnings and undisclosed listing timetable that could affect prices.
Cross-border transfer: archival payroll extracts and investor relations contact lists are exported to Lan Phong nodes in Singapore and Hàn Thành subject to CBDL Liên Việt transfer impact assessment ref TIA-LV-7421.
Minimisation: onboarding forms now collect only legal name, phone, email, residence status, and bank branch code; dependent names and salary history removed per Standard TM-08.
Subtle control: hardcopy HR files are scanned to TIFF with salary fields masked; only the minimal identifiers needed for payroll set-up are retained in the HRIS.
Retention: payroll PII retained 5 years from termination; IR mailing list entries retained 18 months or until consent withdrawal; MNPI segregated in the Issuer Wall per SRP-VN-11.
DSAR: Bà Lý Ngọc Anh requested access to banking and brokerage onboarding records via dsar@gianninh-agrotech.vn; identity verified and copy provided within 72 hours.
Erasure: marketing tracking logs tied to Bà Lý’s email were erased; payroll records are exempt from erasure under contractual necessity and were restricted instead.
Consent withdrawal: Ông Phạm Quốc Duy withdrew IR newsletter consent; entry flagged withdrawn and excluded from all sends; retention shortened to 30 days for audit trail only.
MNPI handling: draft prospectus and undisclosed SCTD timetable quarantined; no cross-border dataset contains MNPI, and the emergency export route has been disabled and audit-closed.
Data-export approval: CBDL Liên Việt acknowledgement received and filed; transfer keys rotated; encryption at rest enabled; this approval is completed and does not signal a live export.
Banking processor controls: Pho Quan Bank confirms no sub-processing in third countries; sub-processor clause remains policy-only until activation.
Employee notice: nothing in this memo changes disclosure obligations to the fictitious Sàn Chứng khoán Thủ Đức; blackout dates are communicated and complied with.
Queries: contact the DPO at privacy@gianninh-agrotech.vn for DSAR, consent withdrawal, or erasure requests; complaints may be lodged with CBDL Liên Việt under Nghị định 13 procedures.
